calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (23 Calle De Los Helechos, Carmel Valley, Ca 93924)
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges.

The sale was confirmed at $345,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the Amended Report of Sale filed September 18, 2012. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $328,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Continued To Nov-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Continued To Nov-13-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Continued To Oct-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (23 Calle De Los Helechos, Carmel Valley, Ca 93924)
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Continued To Nov-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges.

There were no over bidders in Court. Ms. Alavi stated that the current Buyer (present in Court) informed her that he no longer wants to go through with the sale at this price, that there is an issue with repairs to the septic tank, and requested the matter be taken off calendar to allow them time to work out a new sales price. Instead, the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to November 19, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Walker was advised to speak to Ms. Alavi about what would happen to his deposit in the event he does not go through with the sale.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (320-330jidah St. S.F.)
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges.

Ms. Alavi confirmed that the correct property address is 320-330 Judah Street. The sale was confirmed at $1,450,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed August 13, 2012. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,376,000.00 is required.
